series_metadata.series_description: Forms used to record information pertaining to the applicant taking an examination to obtain a license.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain machine readable records on the computer database system for 5 years, then transfer to magnetic tape, retain 2 years, then destroy by erasure ; Paper: Retain hard copy records for 2 years, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
